Uses of Package
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.program.itree

Packages that use org.kink_lang.kink.internal.program.itree
Package
Description
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile
Compiles itree to FunVal by runtime bytecode generation.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.javaclassir
Intermediate representation before JVM byte code compilation.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.program.itree
Itree (intermediate tree) representation of Kink programs.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.program.itreeoptimize
Provides optimizers of itrees.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.program.itreeoptimize.ssafy
Conversion of an itree to SSA - Static Single Assignment - form.

    Class
    Description
    ArgsPassingItree
    Itree for args passing such as [:X :Y :Z] <- \args.
    ArgVecItree
    A context arg vec itree.
    AssignmentItree
    Itree of an assignment.
    BiArithmeticItree
    An arithmetic operation whose second operand is a number literal.
    BiArithmeticItree.Op
    Type of arithmetic operations.
    BindingItree
    An itree of a context binding.
    BranchItree
    Invocation of branch in the following form.

    Invocation of branch in the following form.
    CondThenPair
    Cond-then pair of branch.

    Callback for DeepTransformer.deepTransform(Itree, Callback).

    A fun in SSA (static single assignment) form.

    An itree of invocation of if preloaded fun.
    Itree
    Itree (intermediate tree) representation of Kink programs.
    ItreeElem
    An elem of vec bodies or actual args.
    ItreeVisitor
    A visitor of Itrees.
    ItreeWithRhs
    Itree which supports itree.rhs().

    A lderef itree.
    LetRecItree
    Letrec itree.
    LetRecItree.LvarFunPair
    Pair of local var and the corresponding fun.
    LocalVar
    Sym of a local var.
    LocalVar.Generated
    Sym generated during SSA-conversion.
    LocalVarContent
    Analyzed content of a local var.
    LstoreItree
    Itree of local var assignment such as :X <- 42.
    McallItree
    A mcall itree.
    NadaItree
    A nada itree.
    NestedArgsPassingItree
    Itree of an args passing in the form [:X [:A :B] :Y] <- \args.
    NestedParam
    Algebraic data type of params of NestedArgsPassingItree.
    NestedVecAssignmentItree
    Itree of an args passing in the form [:X [:A :B] :Y] <- Rhs.
    NoTraitNewValItree
    Itree of new_val('X' x 'Y' y).

    A num itree.
    OptRestVecAssignmentItree
    Assignment in the form [:A :B :C.opt :D.opt :R.rest] <- xxx.
    OptVecAssignmentItree
    Assignment in the form [:A :B :C.opt :D.opt] <- xxx.
    RecvItree
    A context recv itree.
    RestVecAssignmentItree
    Assignment to a vec in the form [:R.rest] <- xxx.
    SeqItree
    An itree of sequential evaluation; that corresponds to a not-empty seq node.
    SlowFunItree
    A fun itree which is not in SSA (static single assignment) form.
    StoreItree
    Itree of nonlocal var assignment such as B:X <- 42.
    StrItree
    A str itree.
    SymcallItree
    A fun call which is not a method call, and has a sym.
    SymValPair
    Sym-val pair of new_val.

    Provides access to used/defined local vars in a fun.

    A varref itree.

    Algebraic data type of a varref param: local(name) | generic(owner, name).

    Assignment in the form [:Foo X:Bar] <- Rhs.
    VecItree
    A vec itree.
